headline: Mile High Royal Lions: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Mile High Royal Lions carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 83.88, led by Jahmyr Gibbs, Drake London, and Jalen Hurts. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the RB slot currently occupied by J.K. Dobbins (58.8 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jahmyr Gibbs (99.6), Drake London (97.8), and Jalen Hurts (91.2). That concentration gives Mile High Royal Lions a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, J.K. Dobbins is the lowest C-AVI starter at 58.8. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 12 offensive players, leaving 4 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 77.75, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 12 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
